name: PR-quality eval gate passes when both precision is at least 0.7 and mean usefulness is at least 3 out of 5
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus/grades && for i in $(seq 1 16); do printf '{"pr":%d,"graded_useful":true,"usefulness":4}\n' "$i" > pr-corpus/grades/p${i}.json; done && for i in $(seq 17 20); do printf '{"pr":%d,"graded_useful":false,"usefulness":3}\n' "$i" > pr-corpus/grades/p${i}.json; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/quality-eval.sh" --grades-dir pr-corpus/grades --out pr-corpus/quality-eval.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'gate=pass' out.txt && grep -q 'precision=0.80' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
